name: Light Family Fruit Square (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 150°C/ Gas Mark 4.
2. Line an 8-inch square cake tin with buttered greaseproof paper.
3. Cream together the butter or margarine and sugar in a bowl until smooth.
4. Add the eggs one at a time, beating each well into the mixture.
5. Sift the self-raising flour and salt over the mixture.
6. Fold in gradually with the milk.
7. Mix in the dried fruit and orange zest thoroughly.
8. Pour the mixture into the prepared tin and bake for 40-45 minutes until a skewer inserted into the cake comes out clean.
9. Turn off the oven and let it cool on a wire rack.
10. Cut into squares.
